statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Docs/static evidence is strong and the lightweight ETW lane surfaced exact HiberFileSizePercent lines, but the current VMware runtime still did not produce an exact live read.

links.title: Repo power notes for HiberFileSizePercent
links.summary: Repo power notes contain exact HiberFileSizePercent entries, including the note that the current baseline is 0 when hibernation is unsupported by default.

links.title: Win25H2Clean 96-key phase-0 existence batch
links.summary: The 96-key existence batch confirmed HiberFileSizePercent exists on the clean baseline with observed value 0.

links.title: Residual value-exists string triage for HiberFileSizePercent
links.summary: Residual string triage found an exact current-build ntoskrnl.exe string hit for HiberFileSizePercent.

links.title: Tools-hardened lightweight ETW follow-up for HiberFileSizePercent
links.summary: The tools-hardened lightweight ETW lane surfaced exact HiberFileSizePercent lines on the current VMware baseline but did not capture an exact RegQueryValue hit.
